reviews.comment:
Me estafaron, ayer sábado 11-06-2022 a las 18hs. Necesitaba con urgencia un aceite para mi auto, había 2 personas atendiendo y me dijeron que era el último aceite que tenían y era un F10 de ypf, lo pague $1240, me atendió un señor mayor y me dijo que no tenía en ese momento para hacerme un tiket, cuando lo fui a colocar en el auto el envase estaba abierto y por no querer volver ya que estaba a 100 mts de la estación de servicio se lo heche con la consecuencia que el auto empezó a humear, voy a seguir con la denuncia a YPF, y tengan cuidado con esos estafadores.

(Translated by Google)
I was scammed yesterday, Saturday, June 11, 2022, at 6 PM. I urgently needed oil for my car. There were two people working, and they told me it was the last oil they had, an F10 from YPF. I paid $1240. An older gentleman served me and said he didn't have any to give me a receipt at that moment. When I went to put it in the car, the container was open, and because I didn't want to go back since I was only 100 meters from the gas station, I poured it in anyway. As a result, the car started smoking. I'm going to continue with the complaint against YPF, and be careful with these scammers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPOGVQOVRREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención baños limpios.
No le pongo 5 estrellas por que es muy caro el full nos cobraron 2 café con 4 medialunas 800$ me parece que se les van un poco la mano con los precios. Ni hablar de las naftas.
También tienen un lindo parque arbolado con mesas

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean bathrooms.
I'm not giving it 5 stars because the full package is very expensive. They charged us $800 for two coffees and four croissants. I think they're a bit overpriced. And don't even get me started on the gas.
They also have a nice wooded park with tables.
